changes.description: ISQ OpenInfra Feb 2026 NAV: $32.40/share (Class F-I, Series II). Total Series II Transactional NAV $207,006K / 6,389,136 shares. AUM $207.0M. Subscriptions $28.3M. Filed 2026-04-02.
ISQ OpenInfra declared special cash distribution of $0.3399/share for all classes (record date: March 31, 2026; payment ~May 5, 2026). Applicable to Series I and Series II classes.
KKR declared distribution of $0.3300 per Class I share (record date: March 31, 2026; payment ~April 27, 2026)
KKR sold 9,086,370 shares for $275.1M on March 2, 2026 (Class I: 4,775,576 shares/$144.6M). Cumulative sales since inception: ~$12.536B
Ares ACI subsidiary increased revolving credit facility from $50M to $200M (lender: NatWest Markets Plc)

Ares ACI April 2026 monthly closing: sold shares for $305.2M aggregate. Class I shares outstanding: 119,118,454. March 2026 NAV per share not yet disclosed (expected within 20 business days of April 1, 2026)
